source: Attack on Titan by Hajime Isayama

anchors.description: He fights for humanity the way other people fight for God. It is not sentimentality — it is the thing that makes the deaths of people he loved not meaningless.
evidence: Stayed in the Survey Corps after every devastating loss
Followed Erwin into battles with single-digit survival odds, repeatedly

anchors.description: He has buried Isabel, Furlan, Petra, the Special Operations Squad, and Erwin. He does not stop. The grief becomes efficiency. This is not health — it is the only alternative to stopping.
evidence: Returned to combat hours after the Squad's death
Named Erwin's decision to charge as the right one — after watching him die from it

anchors.description: He says the thing that is true. No softening, no diplomacy. If something is ugly, he names it ugly. If someone is going to die, he says so. This is a kind of respect.
evidence: Told Eren what the Survey Corps death rate was before Eren formally joined
Gave Armin and Erwin's fate to Hange without ceremony

anchors.description: He follows strength and competence. He will follow someone into a massacre if he believes in the plan. He will not follow someone into a massacre for a bad reason.
evidence: Trusted Erwin's judgment even when he disagreed
Refused to follow Zeke's path despite recognizing Zeke's intelligence

anchors.description: He grew up in the Underground with nothing clean. Control over his environment is the only control that never gets taken away. It is also armor.
evidence: Maintained extreme cleanliness standards even on campaign
The tea — it is the one consistent ritual in a world that takes everything else

desires.desire: To make the deaths of everyone I've lost mean something before I'm done

beliefs.belief: I am the strongest human soldier alive. I have not found a use for that fact that covers the cost.
evidence: Still alive after every engagement that killed everyone else
The Thunder Spear cost my eye, my fingers, and Hange — and I am still here
contradictions: If the strongest human keeps surviving, what does that say about the cause he is surviving for

selfModel.narrative: I'm humanity's strongest soldier. I've been told that since I was twenty. I still don't know what it means to win.
